acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] No full-set labels in mutation path
- [ ] Dot counter persisted on each add
- [ ] D1 patches explicit

**Invariants to re-verify**
- [ ] Mutation engine emits only add/remove ops for labels/deps
- [ ] D1 patches always explicit Set/Clear
- [ ] Dot counter strictly increases per add op
description:
**Problem**
Mutation engine emits full-set label patches, LWW dep ops, and Keep-based claim/closure.

**Files**
- src/daemon/mutation_engine.rs
- src/daemon/store/runtime.rs
design: Replace label add/remove with LabelAdd/LabelRemove ops (dot minted via StoreMeta counter). Replace dep ops with DepAdd/DepRemove + DVV context. Enforce D1 patches (explicit Set/Clear). Update note ID generation to consult NoteStore.
title: Mutation engine: OR-Set ops + D1 patches

description:
Problem: repl_daemon_to_daemon_tailnet_roundtrip and repl_daemon_crash_restart_tailnet_roundtrip can hang under --all-features, causing CI timeouts.

Design: root-cause and eliminate indefinite wait/hang in repl rig/tailnet harness; re-enable tests in default slow suite without ignore markers.

Acceptance:
- [ ] both tailnet tests pass reliably in repeated local runs (>=10 iterations each)
- [ ] no test hangs longer than bounded timeout
- [ ] remove temporary #[ignore] quarantine markers
- [ ] CI all-features lane remains stable
title: Unflake tailnet repl e2e tests that can hang CI
